title: Additional container calls implementation
body:
This change adds additional calls for the other container related calls.

Signed-off-by: Alex Schultz <aschultz@redhat.com>

comments.body:
LGTM, Would love to see these tests added to Podman to make sure we don't break podman-py.
@jwhonce @baude PTAL

Yea i'd like to get some integration tests written. To be honest these are just straight implementations from the API docs so I don't even know if they fully work yet. I've done some spot checking here and there but more tests would be good. It's on my list of things to do still
